Common.errorFallback: AI is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
Common.emptyOutputHint: AI returned an empty explanation. Please retry.

Nav.bookLockedTooltip: Textbook viewer is under construction (Stage 10-11 pipeline)

Book.title: IT Passport — Textbook
Book.subtitle: 16 chapters / 554 pages (α private · Reiwa 6)
Book.welcomeHeading: Welcome to IT Passport Trilingual Study
Book.welcomeDescription: A study companion for the Japanese IT Passport exam — practice questions, glossary, and AI tutoring in Japanese, Chinese, and English.
Book.cardQuizDesc: 254 practice questions across 9 chapters with detailed explanations
Book.cardGlossaryDesc: 908 IT terms with trilingual definitions and AI-powered explanations
Book.cardChatDesc: Ask the AI anything about the textbook — grounded in 554 pages of source material
Book.cardTutorDesc: Personalized study guidance based on your learning progress
Book.emptyHint: This chapter has no displayable content yet.
Book.noEntities: (no extracted body entities on this page)
Book.chapterEndPanelHint: Ask the AI about this chapter, or practice the questions tied to this chapter to gauge your understanding.
Book.askChapterEmptyHint: Ask the AI a question about this chapter. e.g. "What are the 7 layers of the OSI reference model?"
Book.quizChapterEmptyHint: No questions are tied to this chapter.
Book.translateTruncatedHint: Passage is long; translating the first 1000 characters only
Book.markCompletedReady: You've reached the end. Click to mark this chapter as complete.
Book.markCompletedGateHint: Scroll to the end of the chapter to enable this button.
Book.retroErrorMessage: The requested content is being rebuilt. Stage 8-11 pipeline in progress.

Chat.title: IT Passport — Chat
Chat.subtitle: Textbook-grounded trilingual tutor (α private)
Chat.placeholder: Ask anything about the textbook. e.g. What is DNS?
Chat.emptyHint: AI answers using the textbook (Reiwa 6 / 554 pages) as context. Page-number citations can be cross-checked against the textbook source.

Tutor.title: IT Passport — Study Tutor
Tutor.subtitle: AI-powered personalized guidance (α private)
Tutor.placeholder: Ask a study question. e.g. What's the difference between the network and transport layers?
Tutor.emptyHint: AI responds based on your study progress — ask about textbook chapters or quiz questions.

QuizList.subtitle: Practice questions (α private / 254 items)

QuizExplain.selfReportPrompt: Before reading the explanation, how did you do?
